name: Good Dog Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 3 Tablespoons Wheat germ oil (you may Substitute bacon drippings or vegetable oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl or food processor, combine the flour, oatmeal, cornmeal, liver powder, brewer's yeast, bone meal and powdered milk.
3. Stir in the eggs, oil and water and mix thoroughly until a stiff dough forms.
4. Remove the dough to a lightly floured surface or pastry cloth.
5. Roll or pat the dough into a rectangle about 1/4 to 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut into bone-shaped biscuits using a small knife or cookie cutter.
7. Re-roll any leftover scraps of dough and reshape until all the dough is used.
8. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until brown and dried through.
10. Cool on a rack.
Yield: about 12 large bones or 24 small bones.
